overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk along a sunny coastal beach. The player moves past beach umbrellas, inflatable toys, and NPCs, with modern stilt houses lining the shore and a wooden pier visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with scattered recreational items

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beach past a green and yellow umbrella and an inflatable ring

orange inflatable ring with rainbow pattern sitting on the sand
white towel laid out on the sand
multi-story modern beach houses built on wooden stilts
calm blue ocean water extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny beach with a green and yellow striped umbrella and an orange inflatable ring in the foreground. The camera walks forward along the sand with modern stilt houses visible on the right and the ocean on the left.

events.description: camera turns toward the ocean revealing a wooden pier and sailboat in the distance

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a beachgoer with a blue and green umbrella, then turning to face the ocean

notable_agents.action: standing under a blue and green gradient beach umbrella facing the ocean

wooden pier structure extending into the ocean
sailboat with a yellow mast near the pier

segments.scene_description: The camera walks past a beachgoer standing under a blue and green umbrella, then turns left to face the ocean. A wooden pier and sailboat become visible in the distance while the modern stilt houses remain prominent on the right.

events.description: camera turns right away from the ocean back toward the beach houses

agents.ego_description: turning away from the ocean view and walking toward two men with surfboards

one man holding a white surfboard above his head while the other stands nearby

entered.detail: white beach umbrella with red base section
white surfboard being held by one of the beachgoers

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to face back toward the beach, approaching two muscular men standing with surfboards and a white umbrella. The modern stilt houses loom large on the right as the camera passes the two NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach with colorful umbrellas and palm trees

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the beach past various colorful umbrellas and towels laid out on the sand. Palm trees become visible on the right along with a distant mountain backdrop, while the stilt houses recede slightly into the mid-ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach with rocky outcrops and mountain view

agents.ego_description: walking along the beach toward the palm tree area with the mountain prominent in the background

entered.detail: beach houses built on rocky outcrops with stairs leading down
blue and white striped beach umbrella

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking past more beach setups with colorful umbrellas, approaching an area with palm trees and rocky outcrops. The mountain dominates the background view while the beach continues to curve along the shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a sunny coastline that transitions from a cluster of beach gear to a wide vista of palm trees and distant mountains. It begins by moving past a green and yellow striped umbrella and an orange inflatable ring, with modern stilt houses lining the right side of the sandy path. As the camera passes a beachgoer under a blue and green umbrella, it briefly turns toward the ocean to reveal a wooden pier and a sailboat before shifting back toward the shore to pass two muscular men with surfboards. The scene then expands as the camera continues forward past colorful towels and umbrellas, with palm trees appearing on the right and a mountain backdrop emerging in the distance. Finally, the movement leads past further beach setups toward rocky outcrops, while the shoreline curves under the dominating presence of the far-off mountains.
